steps.t: The hedge maze is in the Horse-fields, to the north of Bree-town. It seems as though Tob Sandyman just gave you a challenge, but it's not quite clear …
The maze exit seems to be leagues and leagues away from where you now stand. If you can manage to walk at all, you should make your way out of the maz…
Tob Sandyman is outside the hedge-maze on the Horse-fields in Bree. You should speak with Tob and find out exactly why you went into the hedge maze to…
